2605.10218.title: Relative Score Policy Optimization for Diffusion Language Models
2605.10218.paper_summary: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) offer a promising route to parallel and efficient text generation, but improving their reasoning ability requires effective post-training. Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) is a natural choice for this purpose, yet its application to dLLMs is hindered by the absence of tractable sequence-level log-ratios, which are central to standard policy optimization. The lack of tractable sequence-level log-ratios forces existing methods to rely on high-variance ELBO-based approximations, where high verifier rewards can amplify inaccurate score estimates and destabilize RL training. To overcome this issue, we propose \textbf{R}elative \textbf{S}core \textbf{P}olicy \textbf{O}ptimization (RSPO), a simple RLVR method that uses verifiable rewards to calibrate noisy likelihood estimates in dLLMs. The core of our algorithm relies on a key observation: a reward advantage can be interpreted not only as an update direction, but also as a target for the relative log-ratio between the current and reference policies. Accordingly, RSPO calibrates this noisy relative log-ratio estimate by comparing its reward advantage with the reward-implied target relative log-ratio, updating the policy according to the gap between the current estimate and the target rather than the raw advantage alone. Experiments on mathematical reasoning and planning benchmarks show that RSPO yields especially strong gains on planning tasks and competitive mathematical-reasoning performance.
2605.10218.paper_summary_zh: 擴散大型語言模型（dLLMs）提供了一條有前景的平行和高效文本生成途徑，但提升其推理能力需要有效的後訓練。使用可驗證獎勵的強化學習（RLVR）是達成此目的的自然選擇，然而其在 dLLMs 上的應用受到可處理序列級對數比率缺失的阻礙，這對於標準策略優化至關重要。可處理序列級對數比率的缺乏迫使現有方法依賴於高方差的基於 ELBO 的近似，其中高驗證者獎勵可能會放大不準確的分數估計並使 RL 訓練不穩定。為了克服這一問題，我們提出了 \textbf{R}elative \textbf{S}core \textbf{P}olicy \textbf{O}ptimization（RSPO），這是一種簡單的 RLVR 方法，利用可驗證的獎勵來校準 dLLMs 中的噪聲似然估計。我們算法的核心依賴於一個關鍵觀察：獎勵優勢不僅可以解釋為更新方向，還可以作為當前政策與參考政策之間相對對數比率的目標。因此，RSPO 通過比較其獎勵優勢與獎勵隱含的目標相對對數比率來校準這一噪聲相對對數比率估計，根據當前估計與目標之間的差距來更新政策，而不是僅僅依賴原始優勢。對數學推理和規劃基準的實驗顯示，RSPO 在規劃任務上產生了特別強勁的增益，並在數學推理表現上具有競爭力。
2605.10218.author: Zichao Yu et.al.
2605.10218.authors: Zichao Yu, Shengze Xu, Bingqing Jiang, Wenyi Zhang, Difan Zou
